name.en-US: Who is the Rich Man That Shall Be Saved?

sources.description: Translated by William Wilson. From Ante-Nicene Fathers, Vol. 2, Edited by Alexander Roberts, James Donaldson, and A. Cleveland Coxe, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1885. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.

title.en-US: Who is the Rich Man That Shall Be Saved?
